name: Varonis Data Security Platform
description: Integrates with Varonis Data Security Platform REST API for database and file system security monitoring, data classification, privilege analysis, and threat detection via DatAdvantage and DataPrivilege

actions.name: List Data Stores
actions.description: Retrieve all monitored data stores including databases, file servers, and cloud repositories

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by data store type (database, file_server, cloud, sharepoint)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by monitoring status (active, inactive)

actions.name: List Security Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve alerts generated by behavioral analytics for suspicious data access, privilege abuse, and anomalous activity

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for alert query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for alert query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity (critical, high, medium, low)

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by alert category (ransomware, data_exfiltration, privilege_escalation, stale_data)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of alerts to return

actions.name: Get Classification Results
actions.description: Retrieve data classification results showing where sensitive data resides across monitored data stores

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Classification category (PII, PHI, PCI, GDPR, custom)

parameters.name: dataStore
parameters.description: Filter by data store name

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: Get Permissions Report
actions.description: Retrieve permissions and entitlements for a specific resource showing who has access and at what level

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Resource path to analyze permissions for

parameters.name: includeInherited
parameters.description: Include inherited permissions

parameters.name: includeGroups
parameters.description: Include group membership resolution

actions.name: Search Activity
actions.description: Search the audit trail for data access activity across all monitored data stores

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: User identity to search activity for

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Resource path to filter activity for

parameters.name: operation
parameters.description: Operation type (read, write, delete, modify_permissions)

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for activity search (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for activity search (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of activity records to return

actions.name: List Stale Data
actions.description: Retrieve reports on stale and overexposed data that poses security and compliance risks

parameters.name: dataStore
parameters.description: Filter by data store name

parameters.name: staleThresholdDays
parameters.description: Number of days since last access to consider data stale
